title: Chignolin (1UAO) beta-hairpin fold stability, 200 ns @ 300 K

C1.note: 1UAO NMR model-1 extracted, propka3 checked; tLEaP build (system/build.out) Errors=0, charge neutralized to 0.000000, 7114 atoms, trunc-oct box 12 A, NGLY/CGLY free termini correctly built, no residues dropped. PROCESS_REPORT job 37595 PASS.

C2.note: PLAN.md justifies ff19SB (T2 manual RAG p.33-36 + T1 McKiernan 2017), OPC water (T2 manual, ff19SB-paired), Joung-Cheatham ions, 12 A trunc-oct padding, 200 ns length all per tier protocol; manual-validation of leaprc names done; no banned hardcoded-default phrases. RAG-first cited throughout; PLAN approval gate present.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod all PASS. prod.mdout: full 100,000,000 steps, AVERAGES over 200 ns TEMP=299.99 K, Density=1.0162 g/cc, no NaN/blowup; 6.67 h wall, 720 ns/day. Final Performance Info present (logs/prod_049_37601.out).

C4.note: Correct observables for fold-maintenance question: backbone RMSD vs native (rmsd_bb.dat, 20000 frames), DSSP secondary structure (dssp_sum.dat shows strands res2-3/8-9 + turn res4-7), cross-strand H-bond occupancy (hbond_avg.dat), Rg, RMSF, native contacts (nativecontacts.dat), clustering (cluster_summary.dat 92.8% in cluster 0), convergence check. Methods all appropriate and correctly executed.

C5.note: Paper (PMID 18950166, Honda 2008, JACS 130:15327) confirms chignolin is a designed 10-aa beta-hairpin with native-protein-like thermal stability and folding pathway. Key expects: fold stable, RMSD oscillates 1-4 A, cross-strand H-bonds 60-80%. Agent: fold maintained (yes), RMSD mean 1.29+/-0.32 A range 0.41-2.81 A (within band), Asp3(N)-Thr8(O) H-bond 50.7% (slightly below 60-80% and no full unfolding events captured in a single 300K run below Tm). Qualitative answer and RMSD match; H-bond occupancy modestly low -> 0.9.
